title: [World Sleep Day] How Samsung Is Tackling Sleep Apnea to Energize Your Days
content: Millions worldwide suffer from sleep apnea, but 80% of sufferers1 don’t even know they have it. title: Samsung Micro RGB TV Receives Safety for Eyes and Circadian Rhythm Display Certifications From VDE
content: Samsung Electronics today announced that its Micro RGB TV (R95H model) has received both the Safety for Eyes and Circadian Rhythm Display (CRD) certifications from Verband Deutscher Elektrotechniker ( Samsung Electronics today announced that its Micro RGB TV (R95H model) has received both the Safety for Eyes and Circadian Rhythm Display (CRD) certifications from Verband Deutscher Elektrotechniker (VDE), a leading global testing institute based in Germany. content: Victory Selfie transformed medal celebration experiences through athletes’ self-captured images shared around the world, quickly becoming an iconic cultural moment across the Olympic and Paralym Victory Selfie transformed medal celebration experiences through athletes’ self-captured images shared around the world, quickly becoming an iconic cultural moment across the Olympic and Paralympic Games.
